name: Form: Remove Field

description.en: Permanently remove a field from a form.
description.de: Ein Feld dauerhaft aus einem Formular entfernen.

bot: Call form-get first to read the current definition. Then use this warp to remove a specific field.

actions.prompt:
Generate the HTTP PATCH body as valid JSON for removing a field from a form. Return ONLY the raw JSON object — no markdown fences, no explanation.

The current form definition is:
{{currentDefinition}}

Remove the field with `as` value "{{fieldKey}}" from definition.actions[0].inputs.

Return the full updated definition:
{"definition":{...full current definition with the target field removed from actions[0].inputs...}}

Rules:
- Remove only the target field — preserve all other fields exactly
- Do not modify any other part of the definition

inputs.name: Field Key
inputs.bot: The `as` value (camelCase key) of the field to remove. Read it from the current definition.

inputs.name: Current Definition
inputs.bot: The full current form definition JSON string. Fetch it from form-get and pass it here verbatim.

inputs.name: Form ID
inputs.bot: The form's hash ID. Carry it from context — never ask the user.
